tasks.title: Create SKILL.md (core skill file)
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter, 6 sections: constants, routing table, auth resolution, fetch pattern, inline ops (init + remove), scope handling.

tasks.title: Create config-schema.md (JSON schemas)
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/references/config-schema.md with all 4 schemas (config.json, installed.json, registry.json, meta.json), example JSON blocks, and default seed.

tasks.title: Create plug-command.md (interactive /plug command)
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/plug-command.md with valid frontmatter, main menu, all 4 branches (Browse/Search/My Packages/Manage Vaults) with every sub-panel AskUserQuestion JSON, chat output tables, shortcut routing, and edge cases.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — Core Skill + Command
tasks.notes: Review complete. Addressed 2 HIGH (SKILL.md body expanded to ~1700 words, fetch pattern now uses http_code capture), 3 MEDIUM (Browse Other option, semver comparison, vault routing table), 3 LOW (config-schema version note, Search Other clarification, Done handling). All annotations written to feedback.md.

tasks.title: Create install.md (install + update procedures)
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/references/install.md with 12-step install procedure, 7-step update procedure, multi-vault conflict panel, overwrite conflict panel, scope support table, and full error handling table.

tasks.title: Create search-and-list.md
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/references/search-and-list.md with list-local, list-remote, and search procedures. Scoring algorithm: exact name 40, partial name 30, description 20, tag 10. Filter support (--type, --vault, --local, --global). Example table outputs for all 3 operations.

tasks.title: Create vault-management.md
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/references/vault-management.md with all 6 vault subcommands: list, add (with visibility panel + connectivity test + retry/add-anyway/cancel panel), remove (with official safety panel), set-default, set-token (with plaintext warning + connectivity test), sync (with per-vault status table). Full error handling table.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Reference Files
tasks.notes: Phase 2 APPROVED by PM. Proceeding to Phase 3.

tasks.title: Create install.sh bootstrap script
tasks.notes: Created plug/skill/install.sh (creates dirs, copies SKILL.md + references/*.md + plug-command.md, warns on overwrite, reports installed files) and plug/skill/uninstall.sh (removes files, cleans empty dirs). Both chmod +x. POSIX-compatible.

tasks.title: Install locally and verify
tasks.notes: Ran bash plug/skill/install.sh successfully. 6 files installed: ~/.claude/skills/plug/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/plug/references/{config-schema,install,search-and-list,vault-management}.md, ~/.claude/commands/plug.md. Verified via Glob.
